name: Dublin Sunday Corned Beef and Cabbage
recipeIngredient: 1 large Onion, cut into 6 wedges and stuffed with 6 whole cloves
1 Head Cabbage (about 2 lbs), halved and quartered
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the corned beef in a large pot and cover with cold water. Add all other ingredients except cabbage.
2. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to simmer. Cook for 3 hours, skimming fat as needed.
3. Remove thyme, parsley, and onion from the meat.
4. Add the cabbage and cook for an additional 20 minutes until fully cooked.
5. Remove the meat and cut into pieces. Place on a serving platter.
6. Strain the cabbage juice and season heavily with black pepper.
7. Arrange the cooked vegetables around the beef. Serve with horseradish sauce.
Horseradish Sauce:
1. Whip cream until stiff peaks form.
2. Fold in prepared horseradish to taste.
